method: pixel-level bootstrap on TROPOMI monthly-grid means; real_pre / real_post / plac_pre / plac_post averaged separately so each pct uses its own window's pre as denominator. NYC mask = union of TLC taxi-zone polygons.
caveat: Pixel-level bootstrap; understates precision modestly due to ~5km TROPOMI spatial autocorrelation. Cordon n=24 pixels, rest of NYC n=~840. Bootstrap n=2,000.
